definition.name: NXspm
definition.doc:
Scanning Probe Microscopy (SPM) is a branch of microscopy to study the surface of materials at the Atomic level. The technique is mainly motivated from the quantum tunneling effect theory though a few of it successor techniques such AFM uses electrostatic forces or atomic forces to study the surface of the materials.
This base class mainly is designed as a sckeleton or contains common concepts for other SPM sub-techniques such as STM, STS, AFM, etc.

field.name: definition
field.doc: Name of the definition that is used for the application.

field.name: scan_mode
field.doc: The mode of the scan.

group.name: experiment_identifier
group.doc: Group to keep unique identifier for the experiment that could ne a DOI or orcid.

field.name: experiment_description
field.doc: The description of the experiment like comments, ontes from from the experiment.

group.name: experiment_instrument
group.doc: The instrument information.

group.name: hardware
group.doc: The hardware description of the core instrument setup of the experiment. Usually, the entire instrument is supplied by a single manufacturer. To describe the hardware from any sub-components, use the hardware group of that sub-component (child group of the NXinstrument group) group.

field.name: vendor
field.doc: Company name of the manufacturer.

field.name: model
field.doc: Version or model of the component named by the manufacturer.

attribute.name: version
attribute.doc: If different versions exist are possible, the value in this field should be made specific enough to resolve the version.

group.name: software
group.doc: The software description of the core instrument setup of the experiment. Usually, the entire instrument is supplied by a single name/manufacturer/model/etc. To describe the software from any sub-components, use the software group.

field.name: vendor
field.doc: Company name of the manufacturer.

field.name: model
field.doc: Version or model of the component named by the manufacturer.

attribute.name: version
attribute.doc: If different versions exist are possible, the value in this field should be made specific enough to resolve the version.

group.name: real_time_controller
group.doc: The real-time controller information.
The lock-in amplifier information.

group.name: scan_environment
group.doc: The environment information.

field.name: tip_temp
field.doc: Temperature of STM head. Note: At least one field from stm_head_temperature, cryo_bottom_temp and cryo_sheild_temp must be provided.

field.name: cryo_bottom_temp
field.doc: Temperature of liquid helium cryostat. Note: At least one field from stm_head_temperature, cryo_bottom_temp and cryo_sheild_temp must be provided.

field.name: cryo_shield_temp
field.doc: Temperature of liquid nitrogen shield. Note: At least one field from stm_head_temperature, cryo_bottom_temp and cryo_sheild_temp.

field.name: scan_name
field.doc: The name of the scan, mainly lab defined, that helps to differentiate among different scans performed in lab.

group.name: current_sensor
group.doc: This is a link to the current_sensor under the instrument group.

group.name: volatage_sensor
group.doc: This is a link to the voltage_sensor under the instrument group.

group.name: piazo_sensor
group.doc: This is a link to the piazo_sensor under the instrument group.

The scan control information like scan region or phase space, type of scan (e.g. mesh, spiral, etc.), and scan speed, etc. This group mainly stores the raw scan data. For processed data or final experimental data would go to NXdata group.

group.name: current_sensor
group.doc: The sensor information.
An amplifier information for the input signal (e.g. from tip).

group.name: volatage_sensor
group.doc: The sensor information for the voltage device.

group.name: piazo_sensor
group.doc: The piezo sensor refers to the height (or Z) piezo sensor if nothing is mentioned along the X and Y directions.
The piezo configuration information like piezoelectric calibration and material properties.
The positioner information like the position of the tip, the position of the sample, PID loop feedback etc.

group.name: z_controller
group.doc: The PID controller information for the z-axis.

field.name: z
field.doc: To indicate the relative tip position z between tip and sample. The tip position can also be varied when the z_controller is not running.

field.name: controller_status
field.doc: Status if controller is active.

group.name: piezo_material
group.doc: The material description and properties of the piezoelectric scanner materials.

group.name: TEMPERATURE
group.doc: A group handling the temperature such as cryo, shield and tip. For different type of temperature sensors repeat this group.

field.name: temperature
field.doc: The temperature of the sample.

field.name: CHANNEL_temp
field.doc: The name of the channel to measure the temperature.

group.name: temperature_calibration
group.doc: Calibration of the temperature measurement.

field.name: coefficients
field.doc: The coefficients of the calibration.

group.name: TEMPERATURE_DATA
group.doc: Data (e.g, record from SPM head temperature) from temperature sensor.

group.name: bias_spectroscopy_environment
group.doc: To explain bias (sweep measurement) voltage applied to the sample.
Setup and scan data for continuous measurement of bias-voltage on the subject of experiment vs tunneling current from probe.
The positioner information like the position of the tip, PID loop feedback etc.

group.name: z_controller
group.doc: The PID controller information for the z-axis.

field.name: z_average_time
field.doc: The average time taken by the z-controller to stabilize the tip.

field.name: z_controller_time
field.doc: The time taken by the z-controller to measure physical properties.

field.name: z_controller_hold
field.doc: The status of the controller to be held on the previous value, before going to the next scan point to measure the physical properties.

field.name: record_final_z
field.doc: The status of the controller to record the final z position after the scan.

group.name: bias_sweep
group.doc: The bais voltage sweep is a common technique used on the substance or sample or environment to study the change in the behavior of the sample or substance or environment due to change in applied bias voltage.

field.name: settling_time
field.doc: The time is taken to settle the bias voltage at the desired value. On each sweep usually, the system takes time to settle the bias voltage at the next value.

group.name: scan_region
group.doc: The scan region (phase space or sub-phase space) is the region where the scan is performed.

field.name: scan_offset_bias
field.doc: The offset of the bias voltage for bias sweep.

field.name: scan_range_bias
field.doc: The range of the scan is the length of the bias voltage over which the sweep scan will be performed.

field.name: scan_start_bias
field.doc: The start of the bias scan voltage.

field.name: scan_end_bias
field.doc: The end of the bias scan voltage.

group.name: linear_sweep
group.doc: The linear sweep is a type of sweep where the bias voltage is swept linearly from the starting value to the ending value.

field.name: scan_points_bias
field.doc: The number of voltage points the sweep scan to be performed.

field.name: step_size_bias
field.doc: The step size of the sweep. The step size is the difference between the two consecutive bias voltage values during the sweep.

field.name: reset_bias
field.doc: The reset_bias is used to reset the bias voltage to the starting value after the sweep is completed.

group.name: SCAN_DATA
group.doc: Data bias spectroscopy sweep data.

group.name: sample_bias_votage
group.doc: The DC bias voltage that is applied to the sample.

field.name: bias_voltage
field.doc: The bias voltage (DC) applied to the sample.

field.name: bias_offset
field.doc: Offset value of the bias voltage.

group.name: bias_calibration
group.doc: Calibration of the bias voltage measurement (V/V).

field.name: caliberation_time
field.doc: The time or period is taken by the calibration to setup to acquire the data for the calibration.

field.name: coefficients
field.doc: The coefficients of the calibration.

group.doc: The sample information.

group.name: sample_environment
group.doc: Information of environment around the sample.

group.name: sample_bias_voltage
group.doc: Link to the sample_bias_voltage sensor under the instrument.

group.name: reproducibility_indicators
group.doc: The reproducibility indicators are the indicators (links to the existing fields in different groups) that are used to measure the reproducibility of the experiment. The reproducibility is the ability of the experiment to produce the same results when performed under the same conditions.

group.name: resolution_indicators
group.doc: The resolution indicators are the indicators (links to the existing fields in different groups) that are used to measure the resolution of the experiment. The resolution is the ability of the experiment to generate fine plots or images from the scan data.
